chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 747 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 02.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for the applicant. Notice was issued and interim orders were also rendered, however, the applicant has not bothered to have notice issued till date. Office note demonstrates that the matter is listed for orders as to non- compliance/non-prosecution, as the applicant has not complied with order dated 18.09.2025. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
